description: Take down a community. Requires admin role. Requires prior export (exported_at must be set). Per AT Protocol, more permanent than suspension.

main.description: Take down a community permanently. An export must have been performed before takedown to ensure data preservation.

did.description: The DID of the community to take down.

reason.description: The reason for takedown, or null if not provided.

errors.name: AlreadyTakenDown
errors.description: The community has already been taken down.

errors.name: ExportRequired
errors.description: Community data must be exported before takedown. Use community.export first.
